# no-hold teeth-test: terse warrant in L3 + taxonomy detail in atlas

## Context

#13623 **AC2 + AC3** (graduated #13621→#13623). The `§no_hold_state` stance (`L3`, #13620) + its validator (`verified-no-lane` retirement, #13627 / PR #13630) are landing; this places the **teeth-test** — the un-gameable warrant for *what counts as not-holding* — so the in-turn self-check ("am I holding now?") always has it, while the detail stays off the byte-budget.

## The Fix

Per the converged ADR-0007 `compress-to-trigger` split (OQ2):
- **`AGENTS.md` `L3` (always-loaded):** append the **terse teeth-test** to the directive — *"does this advance a NAMED lane right now? — substance, not costume"* + a pointer to the atlas. The warrant the in-turn self-check needs (which skill-loaded / hook-only placements miss).
- **`learn/agentos/AGENTS_ATLAS.md` (compress-to-trigger):** a new `## §no_hold_state_taxonomy` carrying the full detail — the two symmetric loopholes (**L-idle** input-gathering-as-idle-cover; **L-collab** collaboration-as-never-shipping-own-lane / the watch-the-shipper trap), the principle-with-teeth-test (AC3: NOT a closed list — a list is the next weaponizable exit-set), the **ratio-as-observability** note (AC4's signal: informs-not-gates, externalized, never an agent-self-gate, not a contribution-ledger), and the `🖖` warrant-vs-costume anchor.

## Byte-budget (substrate-accretion-defense)

`AGENTS.md` = 24331 / 24576 cap = **245B headroom**. The terse `L3` addition (~140B) fits with margin; the full taxonomy lives in the atlas (off-budget). CI-guarded by `ai/scripts/lint/lint-agents.mjs` + `check-substrate-size.mjs` — an overflow fails loud.

## Decision Record

Optional — the #13616→#13618→#13623 graduation is the record; ADR 0007 (compaction taxonomy) governs the compress-to-trigger placement; aligns-with `§no_hold_state` (#13620).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `L3` directive carries the terse teeth-test warrant ("advances a NAMED lane right now?") + an atlas pointer.
- [ ] `AGENTS_ATLAS.md` `§no_hold_state_taxonomy` carries the two loopholes + the principle-with-teeth-test + the ratio-as-observability note + the `🖖` anchor.
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` ≤ 24576 (lint-agents green).
- [ ] No new validator rule (the teeth-test is discipline, per #13616 / #13623 AC5 — the warrant is un-mechanizable; the hook re-asserts it at the boundary).

## Out of Scope

- **AC1 hook-reminder content** (`laneStateStopHook.mjs`) = @neo-opus-grace's #13628.
- **AC4 ratio-observability implementation** (the hook + COP wiring, #13441) — this ticket only DOCUMENTS the signal in the atlas; the impl is a separate slice.
- **The `verified-no-lane` validator retirement** = #13627 (PR #13630).

## Related

Parent: #13623 (AC2/AC3). Siblings: #13627 (AC2 validator), #13628 (AC1 hook-content, grace), #13620 (the `L3` stance). Graduated from #13621 / #13616. Governed by ADR 0007.
